MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Equity Growth Asset Management is present. Represented by Tom Carpio.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rose C. Warren is present.
Attorney Aaron A. Farmer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-17-2012 is vacated.
